basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Multi-skilled Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) Multi-skilled Assistant (Accounts) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the IISER Pune Multi-skilled Assistant (Accounts) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 33 years. Age relaxation commensurate with educational qualification(s) and/or experience(s) of the applicant may be considered for candidates having qualification and experience higher than the advertised with the prior approval of the competent authority.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in any discipline with 50% marks, 4 years relevant experience in office environment, Excellent computer proficiency in MS-Word, Excel, Power Point etc.
qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree in any discipline with 50% marks. 4 years relevant experience in office environment. Excellent computer proficiency in MS-Word, Excel, Power Point etc.

all_official_links.label: Download IISER Pune Multi-skilled Assistant (Accounts) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Multi-skilled Assistant (Accounts) post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Multi-skilled Assistant (Accounts) post at IISER Pune is scheduled for 17th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Multi-skilled Assistant (Accounts) position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in any discipline with a minimum of 50% marks. Additionally, 4 years of relevant experience in an office environment and excellent computer proficiency are required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Multi-skilled Assistant (Accounts) post is 33 years. Age relaxation may be considered for candidates with higher qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Multi-skilled Assistant (Accounts) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,300/- per month for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Multi-skilled Assistant (Accounts) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune), located in Pune, Maharashtra, with pincode 411008.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, the position of Multi-skilled Assistant (Accounts) is on a contractual basis, as per the information provided.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is advisable to read it thoroughly before attending the interview.
